_description: ION Network Error Code Registry. Machine-readable. Collaborative — contribute via GitHub PR.
_contributing: See CONTRIBUTING.md for how to add or correct entries.

title.id: Field tidak valid dalam discover intent

description.en: BAP sent a field in /discover that is not permitted — e.g. a provider preference or FC selection hint. BAP must declare only consumer intent and location. FC selection is BPP-internal.

resolution.en: Remove provider-specific or FC-specific fields from /discover. Send only: location.gps, category, textSearch (optional).

description.en: GPS coordinates must be WGS-84 in 'lat,lon' format with minimum 6 decimal places. Longitude-first order (GeoJSON) is not accepted in context.location.gps — that field uses lat,lon.

resolution.en: Format as '-6.261000,106.815000' (lat,lon, minimum 6 decimal places). Do not swap longitude and latitude.

description.en: context.currency must be IDR for all domestic ION Trade transactions.

A COMPOSED resource has one or more groups with selectionType=SINGLE_REQUIRED. The /select payload is missing a selection for at least one of these groups. Consumer cannot proceed without completing all mandatory groups.

resolution.en: Ensure your UI enforces SINGLE_REQUIRED groups before allowing /select. Check all customisationGroups where selectionType=SINGLE_REQUIRED and add the missing group_id + option_id to customisations[].

description.en: A customisation option_id sent in /select does not exist in the catalog returned by /on_discover for the referenced group_id.

resolution.en: Only send option_ids that were returned in the customisationGroups of the on_discover catalog for the selected resource. Do not fabricate or guess option IDs.

title.id: Provider dikembalikan di luar zona layanan

description.en: BPP returned a provider record whose serviceabilityPolygon does not contain the consumer GPS from the /discover context. Only providers whose polygon contains the consumer point should be returned.

resolution.en: Perform a point-in-polygon check (RFC 7946 GeoJSON) before adding a provider to the on_discover response. Consumer GPS is in context.location.gps — format lat,lon. GeoJSON coordinates are [lon, lat]. Do not swap.

description.en: BPP included fulfillingLocationId in on_discover, on_select, or on_init. This field must only appear in on_confirm.contractAttributes. FC selection is BPP-internal and must not be communicated to BAP before the contract is confirmed.

resolution.en: Remove fulfillingLocationId from all responses except on_confirm. Add it only to on_confirm.message.order.contract_attributes.

description.en: The fulfillingLocationId declared in on_confirm does not match any provider.id that was present in the on_discover catalog for this transaction.

resolution.en: fulfillingLocationId must be the id of one of the provider records returned in the on_discover catalog for this transaction_id. If the store assignment changed, the on_discover catalog must be re-issued.

title.id: Deklarasi PPN tidak ditemukan atau salah

description.en: BPP did not include a TAX_PPN line in quote.breakup, or included it but calculated incorrectly. PPN 11% must be declared as a separate line on item subtotal (not on delivery charge) for all non-exempt goods.

resolution.en: Add a TAX_PPN line: {title: 'PPN 11%', type: 'TAX_PPN', price: {value: <item_subtotal * 0.11>, currency: 'IDR'}}. Apply only to item subtotal — not to delivery charge. For PPN-exempt goods (sembako per PP 49/2022), omit the TAX_PPN line entirely.

description.en: PPN was applied to the delivery charge or to the total including delivery. PPN must be applied to the item subtotal only.

resolution.en: Recalculate: PPN = sum(all ITEM lines) * 0.11. Exclude DELIVERY and HANDLING lines from the PPN base.

description.en: A packaged food, beverage, or personal care resource is missing bpomRegistrationNumber. This field is mandatory for all products that require BPOM registration under Indonesian law.

resolution.en: Add bpomRegistrationNumber to resourceAttributes. For food: 'MD XXXXXXXXXXXX' (local) or 'ML XXXXXXXXXXXX' (imported). For cosmetics: use bpomNaRegistration ('NA XXXXXXXXXXX') instead. Verify your registration at cekbpom.pom.go.id.

title.id: Nomor halal cert tidak ditemukan untuk produk HALAL
title.en: Missing halal cert for HALAL classified resource

description.en: Resource has dietaryClassification=HALAL but halalCertNumber is not declared. Both fields must be present together.

resolution.en: Add halalCertNumber to resourceAttributes. Format: ID followed by digits, issued by BPJPH or MUI. If your product is halal-certified, obtain the cert number from your BPJPH certificate.

description.en: A food product contains one or more regulated allergens (gluten, crustacean, egg, fish, peanut, soy, milk, tree nut, sesame) but allergens[] is empty or absent.

resolution.en: Declare all allergens present in the product in allergens[]. Valid values: GLUTEN, CRUSTACEAN, EGG, FISH, PEANUT, SOY, MILK, TREE_NUT, SESAME. Regulatory basis: PerBPOM No. 22/2019.

description.en: A packaged food, FMCG, or weight-based resource is missing netQuantity or unitOfMeasure. These are mandatory for all products sold by weight or volume.

resolution.en: Add netQuantity: {value: '85', unit: 'GRAM'} and unitOfMeasure: {unit: 'GRAM', value: '85'}. Valid units: GRAM, KILOGRAM, MILLILITRE, LITRE, PIECE, DOZEN.

description.en: A telecommunications device (mobile phone, tablet, router, etc.) is missing postelRegistration. Mandatory for all telecom devices sold in Indonesia.

resolution.en: Add postelRegistration: {number: 'XXXXX/SDPPI/YYYY', issuing_authority: 'Ditjen SDPPI — Kominfo', status: 'AKTIF'}. Obtain your registration number from Kominfo. Verify at sertifikasi.postel.go.id.

description.en: warranty.duration is declared as less than P1Y (1 year) for an electronics or durable goods resource. Indonesian consumer protection law mandates minimum 1-year warranty for electronics.

resolution.en: Set warranty.duration to 'P1Y' (minimum). ISO 8601 duration format. Regulatory basis: UU Perlindungan Konsumen No. 8/1999 Pasal 25; PP 36/2023.

title.id: Nomor notifikasi BPOM kosmetik tidak ditemukan
title.en: Missing BPOM NA registration for cosmetics

description.en: A cosmetics resource is missing bpomNaRegistration. All cosmetics sold in Indonesia require BPOM Notifikasi Kosmetik registration.

resolution.en: Add bpomNaRegistration: 'NA XXXXXXXXXXX' (NA followed by 11 digits). Regulatory basis: PerBPOM No. 12/2020. Verify at notifkos.pom.go.id.

title.en: Missing Kementan PD registration for agricultural product

description.en: An agricultural produce resource is missing kementanPdRegistration. Raw agricultural products require Kementan Pendaftaran Daerah (PD) registration.

resolution.en: Add kementanPdRegistration with the PD number issued by Kementan for your product and region. Format varies by province and commodity.

title.id: PPN dikenakan pada barang kebutuhan pokok yang dibebaskan
title.en: PPN applied to PPN-exempt basic food staple

description.en: A sembako item (beras, jagung, kedelai, gula, garam, daging, telur, susu, buah, sayuran) has a TAX_PPN line in the quote. These goods are PPN-exempt under PP 49/2022.

resolution.en: Remove the TAX_PPN line entirely for sembako resources. Do not set rate to 0% — omit the line. Regulatory basis: PP 49/2022 tentang PPN atas Barang Kebutuhan Pokok.
